message:
refactor(abi): migrate glibc_internal syscalls and add new wrappers

Continue the syscall migration campaign:

- Route remaining glibc_internal_abi.rs raw syscall calls through
  typed wrapper functions for type safety and cross-arch correctness
- Add/refactor syscall wrapper functions in syscall/mod.rs to support
  the migrated callsites with proper error handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
